pokemon:hatenna.name: Hatenna
pokemon:hatenna.summary: If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.
Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people.

pokemon:hatterene.name: Hatterene
pokemon:hatterene.summary: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.
It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch.

pokemon:hattrem.name: Hattrem
pokemon:hattrem.summary: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.
No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer.
